name: Peanut Butter Oatmeal Cookies/LF
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and baking soda in a small bowl.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the corn syrup and peanut butter until well combined.
3. Add the egg whites, sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
5. Fold in the oats.
6. Using a rounded teaspoon, scoop dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8 minutes at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
8. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack.
Approximate composition per serving: 105 calories. 3g fat. 0mg cholesterol. 51mg sodium. Recipe approved by a Cardiovascular Dietician.
